title: Ubiquiti UACC-G5-Enhancer - External vision enhancer for UVC-G5-Pro
category: Ubiquiti UACC-G5-Enhancer - External vision enhancer for UVC-G5-Pro
description: Optional accessories for the UVC G5 Professional camera. It is a night IR backlight with intense white LED light (600 lumens) and a range of up to 40m . The indisputable advantage is the simplicity of installation, connecting the light to the prepared connector directly in the camera body, outdoor design and IPX5 water resistance. The maximum consumption of the backlight is 4.5W
specsSearch: Camera Illumination IR, White light Illumination range [m] 40 Power Max. power consumption [W] 4,5
